use_cases.name: Send a message in a channel
steps: Open the app; ensure Servers view is active (Home icon selected).
Select a server from the left column.
Select a text channel (e.g. #general) in the channel list.
Type a message in the input at the bottom and submit (Enter or button).

use_cases.name: Add a reaction to a message
steps: In any channel with messages, hover a message.
Click the thumbs-up (or other reaction) control.

use_cases.name: Open DMs and send a message
steps: Click the Direct Messages icon (message circle) in the left sidebar.
Select a user from the DM list.
Type a message and submit.

use_cases.name: Change settings (Appearance, Notifications, Account)
steps: Click the Settings icon (gear at bottom of server column).
Change Appearance (e.g. select Light).
Toggle Notifications.
Change Display name and click Save.

use_cases.name: Create a server
steps: Click the Add server button (green plus) in the left column.
Optionally enter a server name.
Click Create.

use_cases.name: Open server settings
steps: Select a server and ensure the channel list is visible.
Click the gear icon next to the server name in the channel sidebar header.

use_cases.name: Delete a server
steps: Create a server (or use an existing locally created one).
Select that server and open Server settings (gear next to server name).
Click Delete server at the bottom of the modal.

use_cases.name: Switch servers and channels
steps: Click Home (servers view) if not already there.
Select server A from the left column.
Select a channel (e.g. #general) in the channel list.
Select server B from the left column.
Select a channel in server B.

use_cases.name: Return to servers from DMs
steps: Click the Direct Messages icon.
Optionally select a user.
Click the Home icon to return to the server list.

use_cases.name: Full channel conversation (multiple messages and reactions)
steps: Select a server and a text channel that has messages.
Send two or more messages in the input.
Hover a message and add a reaction (thumbs up).
Add a reaction to another message.

use_cases.name: Create server then open its settings
steps: Click the Add server (green plus) button.
Enter a name (e.g. Test Server) and click Create.
With the new server selected, click the gear next to the server name to open Server settings.

use_cases.name: Open Settings and change one option
steps: Click the Settings icon (gear at bottom of server column).
Change Appearance to Light (or Notifications toggle), then click Back to return.

use_cases.name: Switch between DM conversations
steps: Click the Direct Messages icon.
Select user A from the list.
Select user B from the list (without going back to servers).

use_cases.name: Create server then delete it
steps: Click Add server, enter a name, click Create.
With the new server selected, open Server settings (gear).
Click Delete server and confirm the server disappears.

use_cases.name: View empty server (no channels)
steps: Create a server (Add server → name → Create).
Leave the new server selected (it has no channels).
Observe the main area shows 'No channels in this server'.

use_cases.name: End-to-end server lifecycle
steps: Click Home.
Create a server named E2E Test.
Select it and open Server settings.
Delete the server.
